name: hangout
description: Somebody near you is one player short. Find them.

scripts.db:up: docker start hangout-db 2>/dev/null || docker run -d --name hangout-db -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=hangout_dev -e POSTGRES_DB=hangout -p 54322:5432 postgis/postgis:16-3.4
scripts.db:test: node packages/db/test/security.test.js && node packages/db/test/race.test.js && node packages/db/test/notify.test.js && node packages/db/test/weekly.test.js && node packages/db/test/safety.test.js
scripts.typecheck: npm -w @hangout/shared run typecheck && npm -w @hangout/mobile run typecheck
scripts.test: npm run db:test && npm -w @hangout/shared test && npm run typecheck
scripts.e2e: npx expo export --platform web --output-dir /tmp/hangout-web --no-bytecode >/dev/null 2>&1 || (cd apps/mobile && npx expo export --platform web --output-dir /tmp/hangout-web >/dev/null) ; node apps/mobile/e2e.js
